title: S.O.M X ENDERSCAPE
description: A Compatibility resourcepack for Story of Minecraft and The Enderscape Mod
body:
![S.O.M X Enderscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe754ceaf840ca19bbfff92c1c32a039a3e7a8b.png)
__________________________
> # Description
> _**This is a Compatibility resourcepack for Story of Minecraft and The Enderscape mod it makes things consistent if you have the Enderscape mod with the S.O.M resourcepack.**_
> _**except the rubble shields I couldn't for some reason figure out the shields they kept not quite looking right if anyone can figure out how to make the Enderscape rubble shields render as an item in the inventory and on the ground but as a 3D model in hand let me know.**_
___________________________
> # Dependencies
You need these for this to work otherwise why are you here.
___________________________
[![Enderscape](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb73463469a0610a98dfc003e0ca2b7cf5d69a47_0.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape)
___________________________
[![STORY OF MINECRAFT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96f9b645ee0ef11a5e806c5e39776ba6cb50ad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/story-of-minecraft)
___________________________
> # Recommended  with Enderscape
If you have Enderscape, I recommend this mod in addiion to it.
___________________________
[![True Ending](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91aab6d996c9407026bb45a562fcf7d338078e9e.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/true-ending)
